__comment: Novus override of Botania's data/botania/recipes/lexicon.json. The stock recipe is shapeless { #minecraft:saplings + minecraft:book }, which collides with Dynamic Trees' sapling-based crafting. Swapped #minecraft:saplings -> #minecraft:flowers, which transitively covers all vanilla flowers plus every Botania flower (Botania extends #minecraft:small_flowers / #minecraft:tall_flowers, both contained in #minecraft:flowers). Same recipe id (botania:lexicon), so this replaces the original.
